name: Dallas Pawn and Jewelry
description_short: Dallas Pawn & Jewelry offers instant cash loans secured by firearms, gold, silver, coins, tools, electronics, and musical instruments in Waxahachie, TX.
description_long:
Dallas Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop located at the intersection of Highway 77 and 35E in Waxahachie, Texas, serving the Dallas metropolitan area. The business operates as a traditional collateral-based lender, accepting tangible items of value in exchange for immediate cash loans. Founded as a local operation, the shop maintains a straightforward business model focused on quick cash access for consumers who need it urgently.

The shop accepts a wide range of collateral items including firearms, precious metals (gold and silver), U.S. coins, tools, televisions, gaming consoles, computers, and musical instruments. They advertise instant cash loans and layaway plans for purchases. The business also handles FFL transfers for firearms, indicating compliance with federal firearms regulations. Their inventory changes regularly, and they encourage customers to follow their social media for updates on available items.

Dallas Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through its convenient Highway 77/35E location near The Oaks Fellowship Church, extended weekday hours (9 a.m. to 6 p.m.), and transparent communication about their exact location (noting that Google Maps coordinates are inaccurate). They actively maintain customer engagement through email newsletters and social media presence on Instagram and Facebook, providing updates on inventory and promotions.

As a pawn shop, this business serves those needing immediate cash without credit checks or underwriting delays. However, customers should understand that pawn loans involve surrendering physical possessions as collateral, and failure to repay typically results in loss of the item. Interest rates and terms are not disclosed on the website, so customers must inquire directly about specific loan costs and repayment terms.
pros: Instant cash loans available with no credit check required
Wide range of accepted collateral (firearms, gold, silver, coins, tools, electronics, instruments)
FFL-licensed firearms dealer, indicating regulatory compliance
Extended weekday hours (9 a.m. to 6 p.m.) and Saturday availability
Layaway plans available for customers making purchases
Active inventory updates via email and social media (Instagram, Facebook)
Convenient Highway 77/35E location near major intersection
cons: No interest rates, APR, or loan terms disclosed on website—customers must call to learn costs
Limited weekend hours (closed Sunday, only 9 a.m. to 2 p.m. Saturday)
Requires physical possession of collateral items; default results in loss of property
No mention of loan amounts, maximum lending limits, or repayment periods
Pawn loans offer no credit-building benefit and do not report to credit bureaus
best_for: Individuals who need immediate cash and own valuable items they can temporarily part with
Firearms owners and collectors seeking quick liquidity without credit verification
People with urgent short-term cash needs who prefer asset-based lending over credit-based loans
diagnosis: Dallas Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers with valuable collateral who need fast cash without credit checks or approval delays, typical of pawn shop customers facing emergency liquidity needs. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical possessions, carry undisclosed interest costs, and offer no credit-building benefit—making them a short-term cash solution rather than a path to financial improvement.
services: Cash loans on gold and precious metals
Cash loans on silver and U.S. coins
Inventory sales of pawned and consigned items
Email newsletter subscription for inventory updates
